title: Voice Of The Nation
desc: Contestants compete against each other in order to win the prestigious title. S01 E04.

title: Byomkesh Hatyamancha
desc: Detective Byomkesh Bakshi investigates a murder that takes place during a stage play.

title: Hero
desc: Shubhankhar's father, a constable, dreams of making him an IPS officer. But Shubhankhar only wants to enjoy life. He loves Puja, whose brother, a police superintendent, opposes their love.

title: Belashuru
desc: A family's bond strengthens while tending to a member diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
desc: A detective is tasked with investigating a gang of poachers hunting wild elephants.

title: Aamar Mayer Shapath
desc: Vasanthi vows revenge after her husband is blamed for a temple theft.

title: Byomkesh Pawrbo
desc: While trying to solve a case, Byomkesh Bakshi comes across a bigger conspiracy.

title: Saap Mochan (2007)
desc: A shape-shifting snake turns into a beautiful woman to woo a young man.

title: One
desc: An aspiring policeman conducts an informal investigation against a devious scientist.

title: Miss Call
desc: Influenced by friends, Leela scams people with missed calls. She befriends Krishna, forming a close bond without meeting. When Leela goes missing, Krishna becomes the prime suspect.

title: Karnasubarner Guptodhon
desc: The vacation of Sona Da, Abir and Jhinuk becomes a pursuit of King Shashanka's treasures.

title: Bolo Na Tumi Amar
desc: Abhishek falls in love with Madhurima, a medical student. But Madhurima's father fixes her marriage with Soumyadeep Sen, a police inspector.

title: Ghare and Baire
desc: Amit decides to confess his love to Labonya when she agrees to get married to an NRI.

title: Raavan
desc: Ram, who spreads positivity and happiness, fights against Raavan, an evil man.

title: VIP
desc: Raghuvaran remains unemployed for four years, as he is unwilling to accept jobs that are not related to his study. His redemption finally arrives, but for which, he pays a heavy price in his life.

title: Tiger
desc: A teacher decides to fight corrupt public servants and avenge his son's death.

title: Silly Fellows
desc: Veerababu and his best friend try to impress an MLA. They land in trouble on learning that the MLA knows the whereabouts of an illegal stash of money.

title: Ki Kore Toke Bolbo
desc: Jannat and Udaan meet in a juvenile correction facility and fall in love.

title: Hobu Chandra Raja Gobu Chandra Mantri
desc: Raja Hobu Chandra, the generous king of Bombagarh, keeps his subjects happy. However, things take a turn when he marries Princess Kusumkali of Chandragarh.

title: Shakthi
desc: Sakthi becomes a superhero to avenge the death of the girl he was helping.

title: Sithir Sindoor
desc: Abinash, a smuggler, murders his wife when she learns about his profession. Later, he ruins Ram's life but things take a turn when Sita, Ram's wife, learns about his deeds.

title: Bagh Bandi Khela
desc: An anthology of three stories about people whose lives are affected by crime.

title: Rakhi Purnima
desc: The story about the inseparable twin sisters Rakhi and Purnima.

title: Pupa
desc: A family is confronted with a difficult choice after the patriarch goes into a coma.

title: Byomkesh Hatyamancha
desc: Detective Byomkesh Bakshi investigates a murder that takes place during a stage play.

title: Saat Pake Bandha
desc: A man agrees to an arranged marriage, but with an unusual qualification.

title: Rawkto Rawhoshyo
desc: In the quest to find her surrogate son, Swarnaja discovers a child-trafficking racket.

title: Love Express
desc: Laal misses his train so ends up spending the night on a platform. His life changes when he meet Nilasha and accompanies her through the journey.

title: Jawker Dhan
desc: Two friends set out on a treasure hunt after solving a puzzle etched on a human skull.

title: Sudhu Ek Bar Bolo
desc: A man provides shelter and hope to a girl who has experienced trauma, leading to a love story between them.

title: Sotoroi September
desc: A couple who files for divorce, realises their bond's intensity while attending a wedding.

title: Power
desc: Jeetu wants to join the force but is discouraged by his brother-in-law, a police officer.

title: Tik Tik Tik
desc: The Indian Space Research Organisation recruits Vasu, an escape artist, and his team for a mission to avert the catastrophe expected to be caused by an asteroid advancing towards Earth.

title: Golmaal (2008)
desc: Gopal's heroic rescue leads to a hilarious misunderstanding with wife Ekta, igniting a wild affair investigation!

title: Policegiri
desc: DCP Rudra battles rampant crime and corruption in a city led by Nagori Subramaniam. Determined, he takes a stand to destroy Nagori once and for all.

title: Banhisikha
desc: Bilash returns to find Latika married against her will, seeking vengeance for the injustices endured.

title: Shaitan
desc: Amrita befriends a group involved in sex, drugs, and alcohol. After a hit-and-run incident, they realize their lives are spiraling out of control.

title: Sudhu Ek Bar Bolo
desc: A man shelters a traumatized girl and aiding her in finding hope and love despite difficult circumstances.
